name: lease_date_present
expression: lease_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(lease_date)) > 0
description: lease_date is required for Lease Agreement extraction.

name: landlord_name_present
expression: landlord_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(landlord_name)) > 0
description: landlord_name is required for Lease Agreement extraction.

name: tenant_name_present
expression: tenant_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(tenant_name)) > 0
description: tenant_name is required for Lease Agreement extraction.

name: property_address_present
expression: property_address IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(property_address)) > 0
description: property_address is required for Lease Agreement extraction.

name: lease_start_date_present
expression: lease_start_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(lease_start_date)) > 0
description: lease_start_date is required for Lease Agreement extraction.

name: lease_end_date_present
expression: lease_end_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(lease_end_date)) > 0
description: lease_end_date is required for Lease Agreement extraction.

name: base_rent_amount_present
expression: base_rent_amount IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(base_rent_amount)) > 0
description: base_rent_amount is required for Lease Agreement extraction.

name: base_rent_amount_non_negative
description: base_rent_amount should be non-negative when present.

name: security_deposit_amount_non_negative
description: security_deposit_amount should be non-negative when present.
